title: Innovation Depot Live Stream with Eric Ries & Michael Testa
summary: Innovation Depot in Birmingham hosts an in-person live stream with Eric Ries and Wunderfan co-founder Michael Testa discussing Incorruptible and building for long-term impact.
blockquote: Drawing on years of work with founders, CEOs, and investors, Incorruptible explores what causes organizations to lose their way, and what it takes to build companies that endure without losing their soul. It's a timely conversation for founders, operators, and anyone interested in building for long-term impact.
